summary: Completed testing of admin comment moderation feature. Backend API (DELETE /api/comments/:id) working correctly with proper authentication. Frontend delete buttons correctly shown only to admins. Comment deletion working but minor UI issue with count not updating.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 404 instead of 401 for unauthorized deletion attempts when comment doesn't exist
minor_bugs.impact: Low - unauthorized users still can't delete, just wrong error code

ui_bugs.issue: Comment count in header not updating after comment deletion
ui_bugs.details: Shows old count after admin deletes comment, requires page refresh to see correct count

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warnings about <span> inside <option> and <select> elements
console_warnings.impact: Low - functional but creates console noise

passed_tests: DELETE /api/comments/:id endpoint working with admin authentication
Delete buttons only visible to logged-in admins
Delete buttons NOT visible to regular users
Comment deletion removes comment from UI
Previous features: likes, comments, share, search, profiles all working
All CRUD operations for submissions working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix comment count not updating in UI after deletion. Update the handleDeleteComment function to refresh the comments count in the header after successful deletion.
